system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
# Variable assignments
A = True
B = False
C = True
D = False
E = True
F = True
G = False
H = True
I = True
J = False

# XOR function (standard semantics)
def XOR(x, y):
    return (x and not y) or (not x and y)

# Evaluate step by step
# First part: XOR(A AND C, B OR D)
part1_inner1 = A and C  # True and True = True
part1_inner2 = B or D   # False or False = False
part1 = XOR(part1_inner1, part1_inner2)  # XOR(True, False) = True

# Second part: (E OR F) AND NOT(G AND NOT H)
part2_inner1 = E or F              # True or True = True
part2_inner2 = G and (not H)       # False and False = False
part2_inner3 = not part2_inner2    # not False = True
part2 = part2_inner1 and part2_inner3  # True and True = True

# Third part: XOR(I, J)
part3 = XOR(I, J)  # XOR(True, False) = True

# First big expression: (part1 AND part2) OR part3
first_big = (part1 and part2) or part3  # (True and True) or True = True

# Second part of main AND: NOT XOR(C, E)
second_part = not XOR(C, E)  # not XOR(True, True) = not False = True

# Final expression: first_big AND second_part
result = first_big and second_part

print(result)
EOF
args.description: Evaluate the Boolean expression step by step
